title: Roasted Cherry Tomato Salsa
description: A fresh and spicy salsa made with roasted cherry tomatoes, onions, and jalapenos, perfect for topping tacos or grilled meats.
instructions: Toss the cherry tomatoes with 1 tablespoon of oil, salt, and pepper on a baking sheet. Roast for 15-20 minutes, or until the tomatoes are tender and lightly charred.
In a blender or food processor, combine the roasted tomatoes, red onion, jalapeno, garlic, and cilantro. Blend until coarsely chopped.
Stir in the lime juice and season with salt to taste.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve chilled or at room temperature with tortilla chips, tacos, or grilled meats.
